title: General linked to top secret UFO lab vanishes as authorities launch urgent search
description: Retired Major General William Neil McCasland, 68, was reported missing after not being seen since Friday in New Mexico. He is suffering from a medical condition.

title: Disappearance of UFO Expert Is 'National Security Crisis'
description: Retired U.S. Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland was last seen on February 27 in Albuquerque, New Mexico.

title: UFO Whistleblower Says US Recovered Non-Human Craft and Bodies in Secret Crash Retrieval Program
description: UFO whistleblower Eric W. Davis claims the US secretly recovered non-human craft and bodies in a classified crash retrieval programme, raising questions about government disclosure.

title: Donald Trump Promised UFO Disclosure — Why the Pentagon Is Allegedly Still Hiding Files
description: Donald Trump said US agencies should release UFO records, but weeks later no files have surfaced and the Pentagon's review process appears to be moving at its usual glacial pace.
